scripts.lint: npm run lint:web && npm run lint:mobile
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:web && npm run typecheck:domain && npm run typecheck:content && npm run typecheck:mobile
scripts.test: npm run test:domain && npm run test:content && npm run test:api && npm run test:analytics && npm run test:timeline && npm run test:seed-users
scripts.build:mobile:ios: cd mobile && npx expo export --platform ios --output-dir ../.expo-ci/ios --clear
scripts.build:mobile:web: cd mobile && npx expo export --platform web --output-dir ../.expo-ci/web --clear
scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run check:claims && npm run build
scripts.verify:release: npm run verify && npm run check:release-readiness && npm run doctor:mobile && npm run build:mobile:ios && npm run build:mobile:web
